title: Sharpie Metallic Permanent Markers | Fine Point | Silver | 12 Count
features: Proudly permanent ink marks on paper, plastic, metal and most other surfaces
Remarkably resilient, ink dries quickly and resists both fading and water
Endlessly versatile fine tip markers are perfect for countless uses in the classroom, office, home and beyond
Includes 12 silver permanent markers, for a shiny and long-lasting colour
description: From the manufacturer About Sharpie Sharpie has been making bold impressions around the world since its debut as the first pen-style permanent marker in 1964. In the 50+ years since then, Sharpie’s diverse product lineup ranging from permanent markers and highlighters, to products such as the Sharpie Pen and Sharpie Industrial, have propelled Sharpie from the largest marker brand to the largest writing brand in North America. Sharpie Permanent Markers, Silver Enter a whole other writing dimension with Sharpie Make your work shine with the Sharpie Metallic Permanent Marker. The specially formulated, opaque, permanent ink leaves a brilliant sheen on both light and dark surfaces. Plus, the durable fine tip and quick-drying ink make creativity easy. No need to shake them before use, just remember to store them with the tip facing down. Choose your favorite colour—bronze, gold or silver—and get ready to make shimmering impressions. What's In The Box: Sharpie Permanent Markers, Fine Tip, Silver, Box of 12 Notes And Scrapbooking Add a little shimmering to your everyday thoughts, travel memories and doodles, and make them last forever on paper with Sharpie. Brilliant! Occasion Cards And Decorations When it comes to gift giving, nothing says 'Merry Christmas!' or 'Congratulations!' better than a customised card or package with a touch of silver and gold. Collages And Photo Albums Indulge your every whim of creativity with this dazzling bright range of metallic shades: you won't believe the results of your arts and crafts on black cardboard!
